UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores public profile information for a user, linked to their Firebase Authentication account.

photoURL.description: URL of the user's profile picture.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was last updated.

SimulationScenario.title: Simulation Scenario
SimulationScenario.description: Defines a user-created economic simulation scenario, including its name and a detailed description of the policy to be simulated.

name.description: A user-defined name for this simulation scenario.

description.description: A detailed description of what this simulation aims to model or explore. This is used as the input for the simulation AI.

userId.description: The UID of the user who created this scenario.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the scenario was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the scenario was last updated.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores the public profile for each user. The document ID must match the user's Firebase Auth UID.

/users/{userId}/simulationScenarios/{sce.description: Stores user-created economic simulation scenarios. Nested under the user's profile to enforce ownership.

/publicData/{dataSetId}.description: Stores public datasets for key economic indicators (e.g., GDP, unemployment) used in the main dashboard. This data is publicly readable.

/statisticalData/{dataId}.description: Stores various public statistical datasets for the 'Explorer' page. This data is publicly readable.
